scanner.title: Barcode scanner
scanner.subtitle: Scan a store barcode and instantly open the product review or Amazon details.
scanner.permissionHint: Allow camera access to scan barcodes in-store.
scanner.tip: Tip: hold the EAN barcode steady in the frame. Works offline for products already in our database.
scanner.noReview: Product recognized, but no published review yet.
scanner.amazonOnly: Found on Amazon. An IGZ review is not available yet.
scanner.notFound: No product found for this barcode.
scanner.invalid: Invalid barcode. Please scan an EAN, UPC or ASIN.
scanner.quota: Amazon lookup is temporarily limited. Try again later or scan a product from our database.

chat.title: IGZ shopping assistant
chat.subtitle: We'll tell you which product to buy — with Amazon links
chat.placeholder: e.g. Best headphones for commuting under €100?
chat.error: Chat unavailable right now. Please try again later.
suggestions: Which product should I buy for commuting?
Recommend in-ear or over-ear for office work
Best value under €100? Please include Amazon links

home.heroTitle: Find the best product at the best price
home.heroSubtitle: Automatically updated Amazon reviews and category comparisons to help you decide faster.
home.empty: No content yet – run seed or sync.

why.title: Why trust IGZ?
why.subtitle: We combine automated data analysis with editorial expertise to deliver objective buying recommendations.

visual.label: Data analysis
visual.title: Precise comparisons in real time
visual.body: Specs, prices and user feedback are continuously evaluated.

comparisons.title: Automated comparisons
comparisons.body: Thousands of product data points are structured and updated on a regular cadence.

reviews.title: Expert reviews
reviews.body: Editorial assessments with clear scores, pros & cons and a final verdict.

prices.title: Real-time price tracking
prices.body: Current Amazon prices and ratings feed directly into our rankings.

category.differencesHint: Differences are highlighted. Identical specs can be hidden.
category.multiCompareHelper: Pick up to four models for the spec matrix with diff view.
category.matchFinderSubtitle: Answer three quick questions and we'll recommend the top picks in this comparison.
category.matchResultEmpty: No product matches your criteria. Try increasing the budget or changing the use case.
category.awardPickerSubtitle: Choose your buying goal — best overall, best value, or budget pick.
category.awardReasonWinner: The strongest overall rating in this category.
category.awardReasonPrice: The best balance of price and performance.
category.awardReasonBudget: The most affordable sensible option in the comparison.

categoriesPage.title: All product categories
categoriesPage.subtitle: Pick a category and compare current Amazon bestsellers with scores, specs and buying guides.
categoriesPage.empty: No categories yet. Run the category sync first.

search.title: Search
search.subtitle: Find products, categories and reviews on IGZ.
search.emptyPrompt: Enter a search term to find products and categories.
search.noResults: No matches — try another term or browse categories.

deals.title: Current deals & savings
deals.subtitle: Products with real savings vs. list price or category average — updated daily from Amazon data.
deals.empty: No deals with measurable savings right now. Run a sync or check back later.

compare.title: Compare products
compare.subtitle: Pick two to four models for a direct comparison of specs, pros and cons.
compare.pickSecond: Choose the second product to compare:
compare.multiHelper: Select products from a category and open the diff matrix.
compare.helper: Pick two different products for a side-by-side comparison.
compare.aiError: AI comparison unavailable. Check OpenRouter key.

product.scoreHint: Editorial score based on specs, price and user feedback
product.dualEditorialSubtitle: Independent test score and buying guidance from our editors.
product.dualBuyerSubtitle: Aggregated star rating and review count from Amazon.
product.dualNoAmazon: No Amazon rating on file yet.
product.priceChartEmpty: Not enough price points for a chart yet. It appears after more syncs.
product.priceAlertSubtitle: We’ll notify you when your target price is reached.
product.priceAlertSuccess: Price alert active. You’ll get an email when the target is hit.
product.priceAlertError: Could not save. Please check your inputs.
product.priceAlertPrivacy: I accept processing of my email for the price alert.
product.priceAlertPrivacyHint: Unsubscribe anytime via the link in the email.
product.datasheetSubtitle: AI-normalized specs with identical fields for product comparisons.
product.datasheetEmpty: No technical datasheet yet. It will be created automatically with the next content generation.
product.knownIssuesDisclaimer: Publicly reported or typical issues for this model. Not guaranteed to be complete.
product.errorCodesNote: Common codes and first remediation steps. Contact manufacturer support if problems persist.
product.errorCodesEmpty: No typical error codes are listed for this product.
product.experiencesDisclaimer: Experience reports for this product. Submitted user reports are reviewed before publishing. Not verified Amazon purchases.
product.amazonHint: Fast delivery & secure checkout via Amazon
product.inlineCtaBody: Check the current price and availability directly on Amazon — at no extra cost to you.
product.inlineCtaAfterVerdict: Our verdict: this model is worth it — check the price on Amazon now.
product.scenarioTagsHint: Tap a scenario to find matching models in the category comparison.
product.manualsSubtitle: Official documents from the manufacturer or Amazon product data.
product.manualsDisclaimer: Links lead to manufacturer support pages or Amazon product details. PDF availability may vary by model and region.
product.priceWatchHint: Saved locally — we'll remember your selection on your next visit.
product.experienceFormHint: Your report is reviewed before publishing. Please share only your own experience.
product.experienceFormEmailHint: Only used internally for follow-ups — not published.
product.experienceFormSuccess: Thanks! Your report was submitted and will appear after approval.
product.experienceFormError: Submission failed. Please check the fields and try again.

disclosure.short: Affiliate disclosure: Links marked with an asterisk (*) are affiliate links. We may earn a commission at no extra cost to you.
disclosure.aiBody: This article was created entirely by artificial intelligence and was not editorially reviewed. Product details, scores and recommendations may contain errors. Please make purchasing decisions independently and verify current prices and product data on Amazon.
disclosure.aiLegal: Labelled in line with the transparency obligations of the EU AI Act (Article 50): the text is artificially generated; there is no human editorial control with content responsibility.

footer.disclaimer: IGZ is an independent comparison platform. Reviews, comparisons and guides are created entirely by artificial intelligence and are not editorially reviewed (labelled under EU AI Act Art. 50). Prices and availability may vary. Amazon and the Amazon logo are trademarks of Amazon.com, Inc. or its affiliates. Amazon links may be affiliate links.

gamesPage.subtitle: In-depth reviews based on IGDB data — with trailers, screenshots and links to Steam, Ubisoft Connect and more.
gamesPage.empty: No game reviews yet. The daily cron or admin panel will create them.
gamesPage.noStoreLinks: No storefront links found on IGDB.

reviewsPage.title: All product reviews
reviewsPage.subtitle: {count} published Amazon tests — filter and sort.

guidesPage.title: Guides & how-tos
guidesPage.subtitle: {count} practical articles — clean, care, set up. A new topic is published automatically every day.
guidesPage.empty: No guides published yet. The daily cron will create the first one.

contact.formMessage: Why should we test this product?
contact.formCanShip: I can ship a test sample
contact.formCanShipHint: Please wait for our reply before shipping — we will provide an address if needed.
contact.formPrivacy: I have read the privacy policy and consent to processing my details to handle this test request
contact.formSuccess: Thanks! Your test request was received. We will get in touch if we add the product to the editorial plan.
contact.formError: Submission failed. Please check the fields and try again.
contact.formRequiredNote: * Required fields. Please provide an Amazon URL or ASIN.
